case_title: FIA CARD SERVCIES, N.A. VS. SHARON Y. HOSAKA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT HOSAKA, SHARON Y.

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-08-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SHARON HOSAKA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CONTINUED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER CALENDAR ON JUL-11-2011 TO DENIED FEE WAIVER TRACKING CALENDAR CALENDAR ON AUG-01-2011 AT 8:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. (206)
LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVCIES, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. CASE DISMISSED.
